breaking.title: Iran's Khamenei buried in Mashhad four months after US-Israeli strikes killed him
breaking.summary: Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was buried in Mashhad after a week of ceremonies. He ruled Iran for nearly thirty-seven years and died in recent airstrikes. Large crowds gathered for funeral processions which brought daily life to a standstill. His eldest son led prayers, but his successor was notably absent from the burial. This burial occurred amid renewed hostilities and recent strikes between the US and Iran.

breaking.title: Four shooters killed in Gurugram encounter after attack on businessman’s house
breaking.summary: In the exchange of fire, all five shooters were hit. They were rushed to hospital where four were declared dead. One is undergoing treatment.

breaking.title: Gold heads for weekly drop as Gulf attacks reinforce rate-hike bets
breaking.summary: Gold prices held steady early Friday as markets assessed inflation risks. Renewed rate-hike expectations are pushing the non-yielding metal toward a weekly decline. U.S. military infrastructure in Gulf states faced attacks after U.S. strikes on Iran. Markets now price in a higher chance of a September rate hike. Other precious metals also saw slight movements and are on track for weekly losses.

breaking.title: Syria says it arrested suspects behind the Damascus bombings during Macron’s visit
breaking.summary: Last week, an explosive device detonated in a cafe near Damascus’ main judicial complex, killing at least 10 people and wounding more than 20

breaking.title: Death toll climbs to 3 in Rohini building collapse
breaking.summary: Building owner’s husband, construction worker among deceased; rescue operation almost over, debris being cleared, cause of incident under probe: police; FIR lodged against unknown persons

breaking.title: Gaza civil defence says Israeli attacks kill six
breaking.summary: A security source in Gaza said an Israeli drone strike targeted the vehicle of Hazem Qassem, a spokesman for Hamas

breaking.title: 12 Dead In Wildfire In Southern Spain
breaking.summary: Many people were died in a wildfire near Almeria in southern Spain late Thursday.

breaking.title: Venezuela Earthquake: Death Count Rises To 3,889, Nearly 17,000 Injured
breaking.summary: The United Nations is meanwhile trying to raise some $300 million in recovery funds for Venezuela.
